business_problem: Chow Tai Fook (SEHK: 1929)—a 1929-founded jewelry group with 5,000+ physical stores planning to reach 7,000+ stores by 2025—needed strong, scalable IT infrastructure for retail expansion and smart-retail O2O strategy, an agile SDLC for rapid software delivery, and secure backend services able to safeguard online and offline sales especially during Double 11 peaks.
solution_summary: Chow Tai Fook unified its omnichannel retail operations across 5,000+ physical stores and digital channels through cloud-native DevOps and data visualization platforms. The architecture leverages IaaS infrastructure for scalable backend systems handling simultaneous online and offline transactions, particularly during peak shopping festivals. Codeup enables agile software development with continuous delivery, while D-ONE's AI-powered jewelry customization platform allows same-day fulfillment of bespoke designs. DataV provides real-time monitoring of production workflows, and LedgerDB blockchain ledger provides immutable transaction records for loyalty program integration with partner ecosystem K Dollar rewards.
business_outcome: Chow Tai Fook accelerated retail and smart-retail expansion, secured online and offline transactions during peak periods, improved application development efficiency and automated software testing, monitored its production line via DataV, and enabled 24-hour delivery on customized D-ONE jewelry orders.
metrics: Customized D-ONE jewelry delivered within 24 hours of order
architecture_clues: Alibaba Cloud DevOps + Codeup for CI/CD and code repository
LedgerDB for blockchain-based ledger in K Dollar reward program
D-ONE AI/automation engine connected to Alibaba Cloud
evidence_quotes: Alibaba Cloud also provided robust and reliable IT infrastructure to support Chow Tai Fook's digital journey and to safeguard its online and offline sales transactions, especially during peak periods such as the Double 11 Shopping Festival.
By leveraging D-ONE, a digital jewelry customization platform by the Group, Chow Tai Fook's customized jewelry products can be made ready for delivery within 24 hours after receiving the orders.
The Group took advantage of Alibaba Cloud's LedgerDB for blockchain-based database services.

solution_components.name: Elastic Compute Service
solution_components.role: Scalable virtual infrastructure supporting 5,000+ store integration and dual-channel e-commerce transactions

solution_components.name: Codeup
solution_components.role: Code repository and DevOps platform enabling agile software development and continuous deployment cycles

solution_components.name: DataV
solution_components.role: Real-time data visualization for production line monitoring and operational efficiency tracking

solution_components.name: D-ONE Customization Platform
solution_components.role: AI-enabled jewelry design and manufacturing acceleration reducing design-to-delivery to 24 hours

solution_components.name: LedgerDB
solution_components.role: Blockchain-based immutable ledger for K Dollar loyalty program transactions with partner ecosystem

data_flow: Online/offline customer orders → ECS infrastructure → DevOps pipeline → D-ONE customization logic → DataV monitoring → fulfillment execution
integration_points: New World Development K Dollar reward system
